description:
Usually used for children's roleplay, not really suited
for combat. Defense +1.
name: Plastic shield

description: Why would you even wear this?! Defense +1.
name: Stupid hat

description:
There's even holes in the pockets! It'll cover you up,
but won't do much to help you. Defense +2.
name: Cheap cloth

description:
A cheap, plastic ring. It doesn't even really look like
the real thing. M.Attack +3.
name: Plastic ring

description:
Usually by teens and young adults who like to dress up.
Defense +2.
name: Better shield

description: What a cute widdle witch hat. Defense +1. M.Attack +1.
name: Lil' witch hat

description:
It'll defend you a bit, but at the end of the day; 
it's just a cloak. Defense +3.
name: Defensive cloak

description:
Not too bad, but it's clearly taken some damage over
the years. M.Attack +3.
name: Rusty bronze ring

description: Increases attack by 5 when worn.
name: Attack ring

description:
Clothes made in the deserty wonderland that is Caesite,
it's pretty standard. Defence +2. Agility +2.
name: Caesite-style clothing

description: Like a regular shield, BUT COOLER! Defence +5.
name: Cool shield

description:
Gorgeous, fabulous and the peak of fashion right now.
Also, defence +5.
name: Funky hat

description: Not very creative, but it works. Defence +7.
name: Armour armour

description: Pretty decent, I guess. M.attack +10.
name: Nicer ring

description:
A fairly durable shield that is often given to young 
knights and nobles who are still in training. Defence +7.
name: Iron shield

description: It's pretty.
name: Dream shield

description: It's pretty.
name: Dream bracelet

description: It's pretty.
name: Dream bow

description: It's pretty.
name: Dream dress

description: Just a basic cloth, very common. Defence +6.
name: Basic cloth

description:
Apparently it deflects bullets, I'm not convinced. 
Defence +10.
name: Amazing armour

description:
Armour that will make your enemy say 'Oh my goodness'.
Defence +20. Max HP +20.
name: Oh my goodness armour

description:
Feeling paranoid? Why not give this little bow a try?
Luck +10.
name: Lucky bow

description:
Just a nice little accessory to wear while out and
about. HP +200.
name: Charming bracelet

description: Increases battle experience by 30%.
name: Comb of madness

description:
This fantastic peace of magic cloth protects you
wholeheartedly from the magic repression state.
name: Emerald dress

description: Doubles the gold recieved from battles.
name: Magic raincoat

description: It's Lanissa's bracelet.
name: Lanissa's bracelet

description:
An expensive necklace worn by the nobility in Caesite.
Would cost my life's savings to buy myself.
name: Fancy necklace

description: We fixed Lanissa's bracelet.
name: Lanissa's bracelet(Fixed)
